name: hb_7_13
requirements: As part of your analysis, for company 2444 over 2025-06-06 14:00-18:00 compute and store: total_flue_gas, peak_flue_gas (float), stations_within_10km (int), nearby_mean_pm25 (mean PM2.5 across stations within 10km over the window, float).

turns.query: Analyze the impact of Shougang Jingtang Steel United Co., Ltd. (company_id: 2444) emissions on surrounding air quality on 2025-06-06 between 14:00-18:00.
